causal_question: For countries that newly experienced at least one fatal armed conflict in 2000-2002, how did the log of annual non-fuel mineral exploration investment change relative to countries that remained conflict-free in both 1997-1999 and 2000-2002?
vague_question: What happened to mining exploration investment in countries that first experienced deadly armed conflict in 2000-2002, compared with countries that stayed peaceful at that time?
